description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in phpGedView before 2.65 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary HTML or web script via (1) descendancy.php, (2) index.php, (3) individual.php, (4) login.php, (5) relationship.php, (6) source.php, (7) imageview.php, (8) calendar.php, (9) gedrecord.php, (10) login.php, and (11) gdbi_interface.php.  NOTE: some aspects of vector 10 were later reported to affect 4.1.
